# Swift Macos Menubar

Use when working on Swift, SwiftUI, AppKit, MenuBarExtra, packaging, or macOS menubar app behavior in this repository or similar native macOS utilities.

## Install

```sh
npx github:Elvis020/hey-skills add swift-macos-menubar --to ./skills
```
